---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug to help us improve
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the full error message if any.

## Screenshots / logs

If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant log snippets from `data/logs/`.

> **REMINDER**: Please **redact** any personal data (names, phone numbers, voice, chat content) before attaching.

## Environment

- **OS**: [e.g. Windows 11 23H2 / macOS 14 / Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Python version**: [e.g. 3.10.12]
- **Node.js version**: [e.g. 20.18.0]
- **Backend commit/branch**: [e.g. `main @ abc1234`]
- **Frontend commit/branch**: [e.g. `main @ abc1234`]
- **LLM provider**: [e.g. DeepSeek-V3 / 通义千问 / Ollama qwen2]
- **TTS engine**: [edge-tts / CosyVoice / none]
- **Install method**: [dev mode / pre-built EXE]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and didn't find a duplicate
- [ ] I have redacted all personal data from logs/screenshots
- [ ] I have included the full error message
- [ ] I can reliably reproduce the issue
